title: citrus × aurantium subsp. khatta
intro: Citrus × aurantium subsp. khatta, also known as khatta or khata, is a citrus plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to the Indian subcontinent. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subsp. khatta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and cold.
